channel.title: briefUpdatesMainNLbreakingNews
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from briefUpdatesMainNLbreakingNews, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: WATCH: Lindsey Vonn's heartbreak as she crashes during race, airlifted to hospital
item.description: Heartbreak at the Winter Games, as legendary skier Lindsey Vonn's dream of making the podium ends in a scary crash.

item.title: "Black carbon" in Arctic an increasing concern amid other issues in region
item.description: "Black carbon," or soot, that spews from ships and makes the Artic Ocean ice melt even faster is an increasing concern in a region beset with many oth...

item.title: WATCH: Dangerous arctic blast impacts Northeast
item.description: An arctic blast pounds the Northeast and Mid-Atlantic, as New York City issues an extreme cold warning.

item.title: Trump calls Bad Bunny's Super Bowl halftime show a 'slap in the face to our country'
item.description: President Donald Trump criticized Bad Bunnyâs Super Bowl Halftime show, calling it "absolutely terrible, one of the worst, EVER," in a post on Truth S...

item.title: Less than 14% of those ICE arrested had violent criminal records, data show
item.description: The official DHS statistics, which had not been previously reported, provide the most detailed look yet into who ICE has arrested during the Trump adm...

item.title: Bad Bunny hands his Grammy to young boy during Super Bowl halftime show
item.description: Music superstar Bad Bunny's halftime performance at Super Bowl LX on Sunday shared a message of hope, including the hope of what a person can achieve.

item.title: Migrants languish in US detention centers facing dire conditions and prolonged waits
item.description: Prolonged detention has become more common in President Donald Trumpâs second term, at least partly because a new policy generally prohibits immigrati...

item.title: 2/8: CBS Weekend News
item.description: Search for Nancy Guthrie reaches Day 8; Lindsey Vonn breaks leg in Olympic crash.

item.title: Trial against Meta in New Mexico focuses on dangers of child sexual exploitation on social media
Hospital flooded by Hurricane Helene to be rebuilt in another flood plain
item.description: Ballad Health, the nation's largest state-sanctioned hospital monopoly, plans to rebuild Unicoi County Hospital in Tennessee on land that two climate ...

item.title: China sentences Hong Kong media mogul Jimmy Lai to 20 years in prison
item.description: Family of Jimmy Lai, a Hong Kong media tycoon and vocal critic of China's Communist rule, calls his prison sentence cruel, and the "end of justice."

item.title: WATCH: Bad Bunny halftime performance
item.description: Music superstar Bad Bunny making history and what he is saying about the halftime show.

item.title: Investigation continues a week after Savannah Guthrie mother was reported missing
